results.markdown_preview:
CareVault HWPX Parser Fixture

자궁경부암 병리 결과: 편평상피세포암, 절제연 음성.

고혈압 기록: 혈압 142/88 mmHg.

당뇨 기록: HbA1c 7.2%, 식후혈당 181 mg/dL.

다음 진료 질문: 병리결과, 혈압, 혈당 기록을 함께 의료진에게 확인.

decision.reason: The candidate parsed a generated HWPX same-sample fixture, but CareVault still needs a real user or public HWP/HWPX fixture and a browser/Tauri bundling check before runtime adoption.
decision.next_gate: Run the same parser against a real HWP/HWPX sample and verify the adapter can be loaded without bundling Node-only code into the React runtime.
